summary: Fixed CRITICAL DJ announcement volume bug. Root cause: useEffect was overriding volume settings. Now announcements play at 100% volume (1.0) while music plays at 30% (60% of 50% slider). Floating player has additional 5x gain boost for announcements. Volume difference is now 3.33x-16.67x louder for announcements.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Radio.js useEffect (line 27-38) was overriding volume to slider value regardless of track type. Now correctly applies 100% for announcements, 60% of slider for music.
Added detailed console logging to show volume values for debugging: '🔊 Volume set: X for ANNOUNCEMENT/MUSIC'
PersistentRadioPlayer.js already had correct volume logic in useEffect (lines 118-138) with Web Audio API 5x gain boost
context_for_next_testing_agent: DJ announcement volume bug FIXED. Radio.js and PersistentRadioPlayer.js now correctly set: Announcements=1.0 (100%), Music=volume*0.6 (30% at default slider). Console logs show volume values for verification. Playlist has 34 items with announcements at positions 4, 8, 12, etc.

details: Radio.js: Music plays at volume*0.6 (30% at default 50% slider)
PersistentRadioPlayer.js: Announcements at 1.0 + 5x Web Audio gain boost
Console logs confirm: '🔊 Volume set: 1.0 (100%) for ANNOUNCEMENT'
Console logs confirm: '🎵 MUSIC TRACK - Volume: 0.30 (30% of slider)'
Volume comparison logged: 'Announcement=1.0 vs Music would be=0.30'
Announcements correctly placed after every 3 tracks (positions 4, 8, 12...)
Auto-play advances to next track on track end
Station ID shows as 'RJHNSN12 Radio' in Now Playing
Floating player visible on home page
Same volume logic applied as main Radio.js
Additional 5x gain boost via Web Audio API for announcements
Shows '🎙️ Station ID' when playing announcements

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: useEffect on line 27-31 in Radio.js was setting audioRef.current.volume = volume (slider value) on every volume change, overriding the announcement's 1.0 volume or music's reduced volume that was set in handlePlay()
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe announcement plays at same volume as music (bug)
5. After fix: announcement plays at 100% while music at 30%
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Modified useEffect to check track type before setting volume: announcements get 1.0, music gets volume*0.6. Added playlist and currentTrackIndex to dependency array.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Console logs now show distinct volume values: '🔊 Volume set: 1.0 (100%) for ANNOUNCEMENT' vs '🔊 Volume set: 0.30 (30%) for MUSIC'
